messages.content: What is your desired role, seniority level, and primary skills?
Hiring a mid-level Java developer who also needs to work well with stakeholders, entry level to mid, under 30 minutes total
Here are some assessments that fit: Core Java (Entry Level) (New), Core Java (Advanced Level) (New), and Java 8 (New).
Actually, also add a personality assessment for the stakeholder management part
Updated shortlist: Core Java (Entry Level) (New), Core Java (Advanced Level) (New), Java 8 (New), and Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r.
What's the difference between Core Java (Entry Level) (New) and Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)?
The Entry Level version covers basic Java syntax and OOP fundamentals, while the Advanced version tests deeper knowledge of concurrency, collections, and design patterns for experienced developers.
Perfect, that works. Let's go with the updated shortlist.
